creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
After I messed this PR up (you shouldn't write PR if overtired) I've
decided to withdraw it and submit a new one. This time with the right
description, a working shar file and a new version with some bugfixes.
This PR can be closed, sorry for the noise.

On Thu, 25 Oct 2012 17:10:00 GMT
FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
